# CWE-544 positive: inconsistent database error handling (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-544-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

func FetchProfileName(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	var name string
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = ?", r.PathValue("id")).Scan(&name)
	if err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
	w.Write([]byte(name))
}

func FetchAccountBalance(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	var balance float64
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT balance FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", r.PathValue("id")).Scan(&balance)
	if err != nil {
		log.Println(err)
	}
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte("balance recorded"))
}
